name: x-dev-open-mind
description: X-DEV Open Mind - LM Studio Server & Obsidian Plugin Suite

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm -w X-DEV-LM-Studio install && npm -w X-DEV-Obsidian install
scripts.build:all: concurrently "npm run build -w X-DEV-LM-Studio" "npm run build -w X-DEV-Obsidian"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev -w X-DEV-LM-Studio" "npm run dev -w X-DEV-Obsidian"
